scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.build:static: pnpm --filter shared build && VITE_BACKEND_URL= pnpm --filter client build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter shared test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter shared test:coverage && pnpm --filter client test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter shared typecheck && pnpm --filter client typecheck
